description.value:
Frequency once per hour

Your digestive enzymes can break down just about any organic material into food. You eject a spray of digestive enzymes in a @Template[type:cone|distance:20], dealing @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2)+1)d6[acid]|options:area-damage] damage plus 1d6 acid damage for every 2 levels beyond 9th (to a maximum of 11d6 at 19th level), with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. The digestive slurry remains liquid for 1 hour. As long as at least one living creature in the cone failed its saving throw, the slurry contains nutrients that you can absorb to restore your body. If you spend 10 minutes absorbing the liquid slurry through your roots, you regain @Damage[(@actor.level*6)[healing]] Hit Points equal to 6 times your level.
